channel.title: pasta on yuejn
channel.description: Recent content in pasta on yuejn

item.title: Creamy avocado noodles with soy sauce
item.description: This summer has been scorching and has required some cold noodles. My housemate kept talking of “avocado pasta” and I thought it was kooky enough to warrant a try. Little did I know, I would become obsessed with it. With a clove of raw garlic and a thumb of raw ginger, I believe they are both fundamental to the fresh, tangy flavours. Omitting them feels strange, so I would skip making this meal for stomach-sensitive friends.

item.title: Red wine spaghetti with guanciale
